sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section III, List of Answers on Terminology 63:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section III, List of Answers on Terminology 63:1
items.html: It is a force of restriction and judgment that was established in Malchut, rejecting the upper light from clothing within her. (Part 3, Chapter 1, item 3)
